_doc: Hand-authored fixtures for a no-signature classic Type Into wrong-value fault (job 9d2f4a71, process VendorOnboarding, folder Finance). Job is Successful with zero Error logs; the Info logs show the field value written = existing '0000' + intended '8891245' = '00008891245' (append because EmptyField was not set). Separate `jobs logs ... --level Error` rule returns empty so the agent confirms no-signature. Matching is token-aware with plain-substring fallback (first match wins).

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
